name: Magic Marshmallow Crescent Puffs
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 0:15
Heat oven to 375°F. Combine sugar and cinnamon. Separate crescent dough into 16 triangles. Dip a marshmallow in melted butter; roll in the sugar-cinnamon mixture. Place marshmallow on the shortest side of the triangle. Fold corners over the marshmallow and roll to the opposite point, completely covering it and pinching the edges of the dough to seal. Dip in melted butter and place the butter side down in a deep muffin cup. Repeat with remaining marshmallows. Place pan on foil or cookie sheet during baking to guard against spillage. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Immediately remove from pans.
Glaze: Combine ingredients. Drizzle over warm rolls. Sprinkle with nuts. To reheat: wrap in foil; heat at 375°F for 5 to 10 minutes.
